text:
(In reply to Dima Panov from comment #2)

Tested with:

$ java --version
openjdk 17.0.11 2024-04-16
OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 17.0.11+9-1)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 17.0.11+9-1, mixed mode, sharing)

and

$ java --version
openjdk 22 2024-03-19
OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 22+36-1)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 22+36-1, mixed mode, sharing)

Same error
Darius
